description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The pages job uses the default Docker image, runs before_script commands 'apt update -q' and 'apt install pandoc -yqq', then executes a script that loops over directories matching pres*/ to build each presentation with make, creates a temporary .public directory, copies all pres* directories into it, and renames it to public. It publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. No caches, variables, or services are defined.
